title: Ethiopian-Inspired Dabo Stew
description: A hearty stew made with tender dabo, flavorful spices, and a hint of apricot sweetness.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add dabo and cook until browned, 5 minutes.
Add bitter melon and cook until tender, 5 minutes.
Add spices and apricot jam, stir to combine.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
Serve with injera or rice, if desired.
